prs.title: feat: automatic base URL detection - remove NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Removes a hardcoded env var and implements automatic base URL detection across three email utility files plus config, modest but meaningful refactor across multiple files.

prs.title: feat: Make Amplify build resilient to missing environment variables
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-file change to amplify.yml adding resilience logic for missing env vars — small but deliberate DevOps fix.

prs.title: 🚀 Migrate API Routes to Server Actions
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Even discounting vendored/auto-gen content, migrating API routes to Server Actions across a large custom codebase with schema, seed, docs, and config changes is a major architectural shift.

prs.title: Jp/small type fixes, and one un commit that i messed up
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Seven lines of type fixes across six files — purely trivial cleanup with no new logic.

prs.title: readiness calculator, readiness page, readiness collector
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 1096 custom lines introducing the readiness calculator, collector, UI components, and page represents a significant feature delivery; Jason's single commit is a minor one-line component tweak.

prs.title: Ch/readiness
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 877 custom lines building out the readiness agent with MCP/search tools, data-field calculators, collector, schema, seed, and supporting infrastructure is a significant, multi-faceted feature.

prs.title: Fix amplify.yml syntax and add environment variable logging
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Five-line syntax fix and env-var logging addition to a single config file — trivial DevOps patch.

prs.title: Fix AWS Lambda deployment and improve TypeScript quality
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 19 lines across three files fixing Lambda deployment config, ESLint settings, and a small TypeScript quality improvement — small but purposeful fix.

prs.title: Fix AWS Lambda Prisma deployment issue
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Two-line Prisma schema tweak to resolve an AWS Lambda deployment issue — trivial single-line-class fix.

prs.title: Changes to allow staging deploy
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Even after stripping 71% vendored content, ~1186 custom lines spanning auth, session, readiness agent, UI framework, Dockerfile, Amplify config, and docs across 18 commits represents a foundational platform build-out that is effectively a large architectural effort.

prs.title: Update package.json
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-line package.json update — trivially small change.

prs.title: Add AWS Amplify deployment configuration
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 169 lines adding Amplify deployment configuration, next.config updates, and two documentation files — modest but deliberate infrastructure and docs setup.

stories.name: Business Readiness Assessment Engine
stories.rationale: Built and integrated the core readiness calculator, collector, and page that power Skematic's AI-driven business readiness assessment feature.

stories.name: Staging Environment Launch
stories.rationale: Established and stabilized the AWS Amplify staging deployment pipeline, including configuration, Lambda fixes, TypeScript improvements, and syntax corrections.

stories.name: Production-Ready API Architecture
stories.rationale: Migrated API routes to Next.js Server Actions to improve performance, security, and maintainability of the core platform backend.

stories.name: Resilient Cloud Infrastructure Configuration
stories.rationale: Hardened the deployment infrastructure by automating base URL detection and making Amplify builds tolerant of missing environment variables.

stories.name: Database Deployment Stability Fix
stories.rationale: Resolved a critical Prisma deployment issue on AWS Lambda to ensure reliable database connectivity in production.
